sources.mechanism: Match source router distributions through a second-order KL proxy with softmax Hessian and hidden-state covariance.
sources.title: When Model Merging Breaks Routing: Training-Free Calibration for MoE

sources.mechanism: Activation covariance turns weight averaging into a layer-local least-squares merge; HARC applies the same statistics-aware logic to MoE routers.
sources.title: RegMean: A Simple and Effective Method for Model Merging

sources.mechanism: Average candidates need connectivity and barrier checks; low router margin means linear interpolation can cross top-k assignment boundaries.
sources.title: Loss Surfaces, Mode Connectivity, and Fast Ensembling of DNNs
